theme: archaeologist strips graffiti off an ancient machine
title: Graffiti Removal: Recovering the Core of a Scrambled Logic Circuit
strategies: resubmit the scrambled circuit verbatim (trivial baseline)
syntactic peephole + structural CSE + dead-code elimination -- strips shallow identity padding but is blind to distant-node dead logic and redundant recomputation (greedy trap)
functional-signature view: truth-table fold of globally-constant wires + merge of equal-signature distant nodes, then DCE (strong insight)
true sub-signature Boolean minimization / algebraic factoring below the fold+CSE floor (open ceiling, uncovered)
